vo_text: Born on July 15? Your card is the King of Clubs — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Master Leader. You're the intellectual king. You command through clarity and competence. The shadow side? You confuse clarity with being right. You think your thinking is the right thinking. You dismiss perspectives that differ from yours. Your gift? Clear thinking and decisive action. Plus natural authority and command. You're learning that clarity and humility can coexist. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

vo_phrases.text: You command through clarity and competence.
You confuse clarity with being right.

title: Born July 15? Your Birth Card Is the King of Clubs #shorts
caption:
Born on July 15, your Cardology birth card is the King of Clubs.
A mirror, not a forecast. Find your own card free at cardblueprints.com.
